---
title: "Akpeiil Shaker"
links:
  - label: GV300 Showcase
    url: "gv300.html"
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
<div style="text-align: center;">
  <img src="yourphoto.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius: 50%;">
</div>

Hello! My name is Akpeiil and I am a final year student at University of Essex studying Politics and Economics.

This website presents a showcase of my work from the GV300 course, where I analyse electoral participation in the United Kingdom using R and statistical visualisation.

You can view my project here:

[**GV300 Showcase**](GV300Showcase.html)
